Navbar.logoutMessage: Are you sure you want to log out? Your current session will be ended.

hero.cardDesc: Upload PDFs, get instant summaries, and generate personalized quizzes.

about.title: Transform the Way You Learn
about.desc: Upload any PDF module and let AI do the heavy lifting — instant summaries, relevant quizzes, and progress tracking, all in one place.

steps.title: Upload PDF Module
steps.desc: Upload your textbook, lecture slides, or any curriculum document.

steps.title: AI Generates Content
steps.desc: AI reads the document and produces a concise summary and quiz questions.

steps.title: Review & Edit
steps.desc: Freely edit any generated content before starting your session.

steps.title: Take the Quiz
steps.desc: Answer questions interactively with instant feedback.

steps.title: Track Progress
steps.desc: Review scores and improvement over time from your dashboard.

audiences.name: Students & Learners
audiences.problem: Curriculum changes frequently, leaving students with new modules and a limited bank of practice questions to prepare from.
audiences.solution: Upload any PDF module and instantly get a tailored quiz to self-test and reinforce new material — no matter how recent the curriculum.

audiences.name: Teachers & Educators
audiences.problem: Creating quality quiz questions for every learning unit is time-consuming and repetitive for busy educators.
audiences.solution: Generate a full set of questions from a module in seconds, then edit them to fit your class needs before distributing to students.

features.desc: Everything you need to learn smarter is right here.

items.name: Upload PDF Modules
items.desc: Drag & drop PDFs up to 20MB, processed instantly by AI

items.name: Smart Quiz Generation
items.desc: Personalized multiple-choice quizzes based on your modules

items.name: Track Your Progress
items.desc: Quiz history, scores, and your learning statistics

items.name: Rina Amalia
items.quote: The AI summaries are incredibly accurate. 50 pages of material become key points in 2 minutes.

items.name: Budi Santoso
items.quote: The quizzes are truly based on the module's content. My exam scores soared after using Pretest AI.

items.name: Siti Rahayu
items.quote: Upload once, generate quizzes multiple times. A massive time-saver for exam prep.

items.name: Dimas Pratama
items.quote: I introduced this to my students. They are much more active in independent learning thanks to the quiz feature.

items.name: Ayu Lestari
items.quote: Super helpful for studying TWK and TIU materials. The summaries hit exactly what's needed.

items.name: Fahri Ramadhan
items.quote: A feature to generate 20-question quizzes directly from lecture PDFs? Truly a game changer.

cta.desc: Join thousands of students who have already improved their grades with Pretest AI.

ModulesPage.title: Module Collection
ModulesPage.subtitle: Manage all your learning materials here
ModulesPage.uploadTips: Make sure your PDF has readable text (not scanned images) so that AI can provide a more accurate and high-quality summary.

ModuleDetail.aiSummaryError: An error occurred while summarizing the material.
ModuleDetail.generateQuizDesc: Test your understanding with practice questions
ModuleDetail.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete this module and all its related data
ModuleDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the module
ModuleDetail.deleteConfirm2: ? All summaries and quiz history related to this module will be permanently deleted.

ModuleSummaryPage.aiProcessingDesc: Please wait! Our AI is analyzing your module to create the best summary. This page will update automatically when done.
ModuleSummaryPage.summaryDesc: Smart summary generated by AI from your PDF document.
ModuleSummaryPage.quoteText: "Understanding the material is the key to quiz success."

QuizPage.title: Quiz History
QuizPage.subtitle: Train your understanding with AI-powered questions.

QuizSession.notFoundDesc: Quiz session not found because the page was refreshed or the session has ended. Cancel this quiz to return your quota.
QuizSession.submitModalDesc: Are you sure you want to submit your answers now? You cannot change your answers after submission.
QuizSession.exitModalDesc: If you close this tab, your quiz session will end. Quiz quota will not be automatically returned.

QuizEdit.title: Edit Quiz
QuizEdit.subtitle: Edit the content below, then download as PDF.

ProfilePage.title: Profile
ProfilePage.subtitle: Manage your account information.
ProfilePage.updateEmailDesc: An OTP will be sent to your new email address for verification.
ProfilePage.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
ProfilePage.errorEmailSame: New email must be different from your current email.
ProfilePage.toastOtpFailed: Failed to send OTP. Please try again.

ReviewPage.title: Reviews
ReviewPage.subtitle: Share your experience and read what others say about Pretest AI

InfoPage.heroDesc: Pretest AI reads your learning material and instantly generates a summary and quiz. Study smarter, track your progress, and never run out of practice questions.
InfoPage.aiModelsDesc: We use the best available models so your summaries and quizzes are always accurate and insightful.
InfoPage.howItWorksTitle: From PDF to Quiz in Minutes
InfoPage.howItWorksDesc: A simple five-step workflow designed for both learners and educators.
InfoPage.pricingDesc: Pay only for what you use. Each quota covers one AI quiz generation and one summarization.
InfoPage.ctaDesc: Get your quota and start generating quizzes from your own learning materials in under a minute.

steps.title: Upload PDF Module
steps.description: Upload your learning material in PDF format. Supports textbooks, lecture slides, curriculum documents, and more.

steps.title: AI Generates Summary & Quiz
steps.description: Our AI reads and understands your document, then automatically produces a concise summary and a set of quiz questions.

steps.title: Review & Edit Content
steps.description: Not happy with a question or summary? You can freely edit any generated content before starting your session.

steps.title: Take the Interactive Quiz
steps.description: Answer questions in an interactive session with immediate feedback after each response.

steps.title: Track Your Progress
steps.description: Review your quiz history, scores, and improvement over time from your personal dashboard.

audiences.solution: Upload any PDF module and instantly get a tailored quiz to self-test and reinforce new material — no matter how recent.
